title: cistus alyssoides var. rugosum
intro: Cistus alyssoides var. rugosum is a variety of rockrose, a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and acting as an antiseptic. Cistus alyssoides var. rugosum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
